notes:
It runs without "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%", but the framerate is terrible, and the passengers are invisible. 
With PROTON_USE_WINED3D the framerate is playable and I can see the passengers also :-)
title: Bus Driver Simulator 2019

notes: It even runs without "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%", but the framerate is low, and the passengers are invisible. With WineD3d it runs smooth and I can see the peoples also. :-)
title: Bus Driver Simulator 2019

notes: Works great wit Proton 4.2-7 out of the box, framerate is ok now (the program itself is upgraded a lot. )
title: Bus Driver Simulator 2019
